title: Odal Node — Tyre Sector Data (v1.0.0)
description: Tyre fields per EU Regulation 2020/740 on tyre labelling (replacing 1222/2009, effective 1 May 2021) and ESPR Working Plan 2025-2030. DPP mandate expected ~2029. NOTE: fuel efficiency and wet grip classes are A-E (5 classes) per the 2021 label, NOT the old A-G scale.

tyreClass.description: Tyre class per EU 2020/740: C1 = passenger cars, C2 = vans and light trucks, C3 = heavy-duty trucks.

fuelEfficiencyClass.description: Fuel efficiency class A-E per EU Regulation 2020/740 (A = lowest rolling resistance). The old A-G scale (Regulation 1222/2009) was replaced on 1 May 2021.

wetGripClass.description: Wet grip class A-E per EU Regulation 2020/740 (A = shortest stopping distance on wet road).

externalRollingNoiseDb.description: External rolling noise in decibels (dB), measured per UN ECE R117.

noisePerformanceClass.description: Noise performance class A/B/C per EU 2020/740 Annex I. Class A = significantly below limit; B = below limit; C = at or above limit. Thresholds differ per tyre class (C1/C2/C3).

recycledRubberPct.description: Recycled rubber content as a percentage of total rubber weight.

co2ePerTyreKg.description: Carbon footprint in kg CO2e per tyre unit.
